Price by origin
Price vs average by origin
Each origin's current price relative to the average across all origins. Negative bars indicate a discount — the larger the discount, the higher the fraud incentive.
Origin price comparison
Origin Price vs avg Discount Source Pressure
fiin analysis Prices indicative  ·  not real-time trading data
How to read this: The fraud pressure signal is driven by spread divergence — when one origin trades significantly below the highest-priced origin, the financial incentive to blend, substitute or mislabel increases sharply. Bars above the dashed norm line on the spread chart indicate elevated pressure. RASFF alerts (right) are fetched daily via Google Apps Script and reflect real EU/UK enforcement notifications for this commodity category.
